s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 brake pads from the front disc brake cylinder mounting.
Remove the 2 anti-squeal shims and the 2 pad wear indicator plates from each pad.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DISC BRAKE PAD SUPPORT PLATE

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 front disc brake pad support plates.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER MOUNTING

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bolts and front disc brake cylinder mounting.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER SLIDE PIN

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 1 front disc brake cylinder slide pin from the front disc brake cylinder mounting.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER SLIDE PIN

s2.ptxt: Remove the No. 2 front disc brake cylinder slide pin from the front disc brake cylinder mounting.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DISC BRAKE CYLINDER SLIDE BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the cylinder slide bushing from the No. 2 front disc brake cylinder slide pin.

atten3.ptxt: Do not damage the No. 2 front disc brake cylinder slide pin.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DISC BRAKE BUSHING DUST BOOT

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 bushing dust boots from the front disc brake cylinder mounting.
Using a screwdriver, remove the cylinder boot set ring and the cylinder boot.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the brake piston and cylinder.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the cylinder boot.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the brake piston and cylinder.

s2.ptxt: Prepare a wooden plate to hold the pistons.
Place the wooden plate between the piston and the disc brake cylinder assembly.
Use compressed air to remove the piston from the disc brake cylinder assembly.

atten2.ptxt: Do not place your fingers in front of the piston when using compressed air.

atten3.ptxt: Do not spatter the brake fluid.

s2.ptxt: Using a screwdriver, remove the piston seal from the disc brake cylinder assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Do not damage the inner cylinder or cylinder groove.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DISC BRAKE BLEEDER PLUG CAP

s2.ptxt: Remove the front disc brake bleeder plug cap.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT DISC BRAKE BLEEDER PLUG

atten4.ptxt: Put matchmarks on the disc and the axle hub.
